
```{r setup, include=FALSE, echo=FALSE}
require("knitr")
opts_knit$set(root.dir = "~/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-AllenInstitute/Species/Evo-M1-Trait-Data/")
```
```{r}
getwd()
```

```{r}
#setwd("~/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-AllenInstitute/Species/Evo-M1-Trait-Data/")
folder_path <- "./DosSantos_etal_2020/"

library(dplyr)
library(readxl)
library(readr)

# Set options to turn off scientific notation
options(scipen = 999)

# 1. Read the published dataset (reformatted but before species names were updated)
DosSantos_etal_2020_Table1 <- read_csv(paste0(folder_path,"DosSantos_etal_2020_Table1.csv"))

# 2. Read the unpublished dataset and simplify it for comparison
tabledirectxl <- read_excel(paste0(folder_path,"2020-PublishedDataMammalsMicroglia - cópia.xlsx"))
tabledirect_reduced <- tabledirectxl[tabledirectxl$`Section #` != "Average", ]
tabledirect_reduced <- tabledirectxl[-c(1,4:7,12)]
tabledirect_summary <- as.data.frame(tabledirect_reduced %>% summarise(across(everything(), mean,na.rm=T), .by = c("Animal Latin Name", "Structure")))
```
<!-- ```{r} -->
<!-- # 3. Whole brain -->
<!-- # Whole Brain C (number of cells) -->
<!-- unpublished <- data.frame(tabledirect_summary$`Number cells 2H`[tabledirect_summary$Structure == c("Whole brain")], tabledirect_summary$`Animal Latin Name`[tabledirect_summary$Structure == c("Whole brain")]) -->
<!-- paper <- data.frame(DosSantos_etal_2020_Table1$Br_C, DosSantos_etal_2020_Table1$"Species name") -->
<!-- colnames(paper)=c("Br_C", "Species") -->
<!-- colnames(unpublished)=c("Br_C_U", "Species") -->
<!-- merged_df<- merge(paper,unpublished, all = T) -->
<!-- ## the different ones -->
<!-- paper[!paper$Br_C %in% unpublished$Br_C_U, ] -->
<!-- ## Calculate percentage difference -->
<!-- merged_df$Percentage_Difference <- ((merged_df$Br_C_U - merged_df$Br_C) / merged_df$Br_C) * 100 -->
<!-- merged_df -->
<!-- # Subset rows where Percentage_Difference is greater than zero -->
<!-- subset(merged_df, abs(Percentage_Difference) > 0, select = c("Species", "Percentage_Difference")) -->
<!-- ``` -->
```{r}
df_list<-list()
```

```{r}
UV <- "Number cells 2H"
US <- "Whole brain"
PSV <- "Br_C"

unpublished <- data.frame(tabledirect_summary[[UV]][tabledirect_summary$Structure == US], tabledirect_summary$"Animal Latin Name"[tabledirect_summary$Structure == US])
paper <- data.frame(DosSantos_etal_2020_Table1[[PSV]], DosSantos_etal_2020_Table1$"Species name")
colnames(paper) <- c(PSV, "Species")
colnames(unpublished) <- c(paste0(PSV, "_U"), "Species")
merged_df <- merge(paper, unpublished, all = TRUE)
## the different ones
different_rows <- paper[!paper[[PSV]] %in% unpublished[[paste0(PSV, "_U")]], ]
## Calculate percentage difference
merged_df$Percentage_Difference <- ((merged_df[[paste0(PSV, "_U")]] - merged_df[[PSV]]) / merged_df[[PSV]]) * 100
# add merged_df to the list
df_list[[paste0(PSV)]]<-merged_df
# Subset rows where Percentage_Difference is greater than zero
subset_df <- subset(merged_df, abs(Percentage_Difference) > 0, select = c("Species", "Percentage_Difference"))
print(subset_df)
```

```{r}
UV <- "Iba1/N"
US <- "Whole brain"
PSV <- "Br_I/N"

unpublished <- data.frame(tabledirect_summary[[UV]][tabledirect_summary$Structure == US], tabledirect_summary$"Animal Latin Name"[tabledirect_summary$Structure == US])
paper <- data.frame(DosSantos_etal_2020_Table1[[PSV]], DosSantos_etal_2020_Table1$"Species name")
colnames(paper) <- c(PSV, "Species")
colnames(unpublished) <- c(paste0(PSV, "_U"), "Species")
merged_df <- merge(paper, unpublished, all = TRUE)
## the different ones
different_rows <- paper[!paper[[PSV]] %in% unpublished[[paste0(PSV, "_U")]], ]
## Calculate percentage difference
merged_df$Percentage_Difference <- ((merged_df[[paste0(PSV, "_U")]] - merged_df[[PSV]]) / merged_df[[PSV]]) * 100
# add merged_df to the list
df_list[[paste0(PSV)]]<-merged_df
# Subset rows where Percentage_Difference is greater than zero
subset_df <- subset(merged_df, abs(Percentage_Difference) > 0, select = c("Species", "Percentage_Difference"))
print(subset_df)
```

```{r}
process_data <- function(UV, US, PSV, tabledirect_summary, DosSantos_etal_2020_Table1, df_list) {
  unpublished <- data.frame(tabledirect_summary[[UV]][tabledirect_summary$Structure == US], tabledirect_summary$"Animal Latin Name"[tabledirect_summary$Structure == US])
  paper <- data.frame(DosSantos_etal_2020_Table1[[PSV]], DosSantos_etal_2020_Table1$"Species name")
  colnames(paper) <- c(PSV, "Species")
  colnames(unpublished) <- c(paste0(PSV, "_U"), "Species")
  merged_df <- merge(paper, unpublished, all = TRUE)
  ## the different ones
  different_rows <- paper[!paper[[PSV]] %in% unpublished[[paste0(PSV, "_U")]], ]
  ## Calculate percentage difference
  merged_df$Percentage_Difference <- ((merged_df[[paste0(PSV, "_U")]] - merged_df[[PSV]]) / merged_df[[PSV]]) * 100
  # add merged_df to the list
  df_list[[paste0(PSV)]] <- merged_df
  # Subset rows where Percentage_Difference is greater than zero
  subset_df <- subset(merged_df, abs(Percentage_Difference) > 0, select = c("Species", "Percentage_Difference"))
  print(subset_df)
}
# Create a table with UV, US, and PSV values
params_table <- data.frame(
  UV = c("Number cells 2H", "Iba1/N"),
  US = c("Whole brain", "Whole brain"),
  PSV = c("Br_C", "Br_I/N")
)

# Create an empty list to store the results
df_list <- list()

# Loop through each row in the params_table and run the process_data function
for (i in 1:nrow(params_table)) {
  UV <- params_table$UV[i]
  US <- params_table$US[i]
  PSV <- params_table$PSV[i]
  
  print(paste("Processing data with UV:", UV, ", US:", US, ", PSV:", PSV))
  
  process_data(UV, US, PSV, tabledirect_summary, DosSantos_etal_2020_Table1, df_list)
}
```

```{r}
# Whole Brain I/N (microglia per neurons)
unpublished <- data.frame(tabledirect_summary$`Iba1/N`[tabledirect_summary$Structure == c("Whole brain")], tabledirect_summary$`Animal Latin Name`[tabledirect_summary$Structure == c("Whole brain")])
paper <- data.frame(DosSantos_etal_2020_Table1$`Br_I/N`, DosSantos_etal_2020_Table1$"Species name")
colnames(paper)=c("Br_I/N", "Species")
colnames(unpublished)=c("Br_I/N_U", "Species")
merged_df<- merge(paper,unpublished, all = T)
## the different ones after rounding up
paper[!paper$`Br_I/N` %in% round(unpublished$`Br_I/N_U`,digits=3), ]
## Calculate percentage difference
merged_df$Percentage_Difference <- ((merged_df$`Br_I/N_U` - merged_df$`Br_I/N`) / merged_df$`Br_I/N`) * 100
merged_df
min(merged_df$Percentage_Difference, na.rm = TRUE)
max(merged_df$Percentage_Difference, na.rm = TRUE)

```
```{r}
# 4. "Cerebral cortex, total (GM+WM+hippoc)"
# "Cerebral cortex, total (GM+WM+hippoc)" C (number of cells)
unpublished <- data.frame(tabledirect_summary$`Number cells 2H`[tabledirect_summary$Structure == c("Cerebral cortex, total (GM+WM+hippoc)")], tabledirect_summary$`Animal Latin Name`[tabledirect_summary$Structure == c("Cerebral cortex, total (GM+WM+hippoc)")])
paper <- data.frame(DosSantos_etal_2020_Table1$Cx_C, DosSantos_etal_2020_Table1$"Species name")
colnames(paper)=c("Cx_C", "Species")
colnames(unpublished)=c("Cx_C_U", "Species")
merged_df<- merge(paper,unpublished, all = T)
## the different ones
paper[!paper$Cx_C %in% unpublished$Cx_C_U, ]
## Calculate percentage difference
merged_df$Percentage_Difference <- ((merged_df$Cx_C_U - merged_df$Cx_C) / merged_df$Cx_C) * 100
merged_df
min(merged_df$Percentage_Difference, na.rm = TRUE)
max(merged_df$Percentage_Difference, na.rm = TRUE)
```
```{r}
# "Cerebral cortex, total (GM+WM+hippoc)" I/N (microglia per neurons)
unpublished <- data.frame(tabledirect_summary$`Iba1/N`[tabledirect_summary$Structure == c("Cerebral cortex, total (GM+WM+hippoc)")], tabledirect_summary$`Animal Latin Name`[tabledirect_summary$Structure == c("Cerebral cortex, total (GM+WM+hippoc)")])
paper <- data.frame(DosSantos_etal_2020_Table1$`Cx_I/N`, DosSantos_etal_2020_Table1$"Species name")
colnames(paper)=c("Cx_I/N", "Species")
colnames(unpublished)=c("Cx_I/N_U", "Species")
merged_df<- merge(paper,unpublished, all = T)
## the different ones after rounding up
paper[!paper$`Cx_I/N` %in% round(unpublished$`Cx_I/N_U`,digits=3), ]
## Calculate percentage difference
merged_df$Percentage_Difference <- ((merged_df$`Cx_I/N_U` - merged_df$`Cx_I/N`) / merged_df$`Cx_I/N`) * 100
merged_df
min(merged_df$Percentage_Difference, na.rm = TRUE)
max(merged_df$Percentage_Difference, na.rm = TRUE)
```

```{r}
# 5. "Cerebellum"
# "Cerebellum" C (number of cells)
unpublished <- data.frame(tabledirect_summary$`Number cells 2H`[tabledirect_summary$Structure == c("Cerebellum")], tabledirect_summary$`Animal Latin Name`[tabledirect_summary$Structure == c("Cerebellum")])
paper <- data.frame(DosSantos_etal_2020_Table1$Cb_C, DosSantos_etal_2020_Table1$"Species name")
colnames(paper)=c("Cb_C", "Species")
colnames(unpublished)=c("Cb_C_U", "Species")
merged_df<- merge(paper,unpublished, all = T)
## the different ones
paper[!paper$Cb_C %in% unpublished$Cb_C_U, ]
## Calculate percentage difference
merged_df$Percentage_Difference <- ((merged_df$Cb_C_U - merged_df$Cb_C) / merged_df$Cb_C) * 100
merged_df
min(merged_df$Percentage_Difference, na.rm = TRUE)
max(merged_df$Percentage_Difference, na.rm = TRUE)
```

```{r}
# "Cerebellum" I/N (microglia per neurons)
unpublished <- data.frame(tabledirect_summary$`Iba1/N`[tabledirect_summary$Structure == c("Cerebellum")], tabledirect_summary$`Animal Latin Name`[tabledirect_summary$Structure == c("Cerebellum")])
paper <- data.frame(DosSantos_etal_2020_Table1$`Cb_I/N`, DosSantos_etal_2020_Table1$"Species name")
colnames(paper)=c("Cb_I/N", "Species")
colnames(unpublished)=c("Cb_I/N_U", "Species")
merged_df<- merge(paper,unpublished, all = T)
## the different ones after rounding up
paper[!paper$`Cb_I/N` %in% round(unpublished$`Cb_I/N_U`,digits=3), ]
## Calculate percentage difference
merged_df$Percentage_Difference <- ((merged_df$`Cb_I/N_U` - merged_df$`Cb_I/N`) / merged_df$`Cb_I/N`) * 100
merged_df
min(merged_df$Percentage_Difference, na.rm = TRUE)
max(merged_df$Percentage_Difference, na.rm = TRUE)
```
```{r}
# "Cerebellum" N (number of NEURONS)   <-- ADDED
# This script checked Cerebellum C and I/N but never N, so the published Cb_N typo for
# Procavia capensis was missed. This block compares published Cb_N to the unpublished neuron
# counts and flags Procavia (published Cb_N is ~10x too high -> ~ -90%).
unpublished <- data.frame(tabledirect_summary$`Neurons, 2H`[tabledirect_summary$Structure == c("Cerebellum")], tabledirect_summary$`Animal Latin Name`[tabledirect_summary$Structure == c("Cerebellum")])
paper <- data.frame(DosSantos_etal_2020_Table1$Cb_N, DosSantos_etal_2020_Table1$"Species name")
colnames(paper)=c("Cb_N", "Species")
colnames(unpublished)=c("Cb_N_U", "Species")
merged_df<- merge(paper,unpublished, all = T)
## the different ones
paper[!paper$Cb_N %in% unpublished$Cb_N_U, ]
## Calculate percentage difference
merged_df$Percentage_Difference <- ((merged_df$Cb_N_U - merged_df$Cb_N) / merged_df$Cb_N) * 100
merged_df
min(merged_df$Percentage_Difference, na.rm = TRUE)
max(merged_df$Percentage_Difference, na.rm = TRUE)
## FLAG large differences -> Procavia capensis shows up here
subset(merged_df, abs(Percentage_Difference) > 10, select = c("Species", "Cb_N", "Cb_N_U", "Percentage_Difference"))
```

```{r}
# SANITY CHECK (ADDED): in the PUBLISHED table, neurons (N) and microglia (I) must never exceed
# total cells (C) of the same structure -- if they do, the value is impossible (a transcription typo).
# This is the robust, general catch: it finds Procavia capensis cerebellum (Cb_N > Cb_C) and
# Tragelaphus strepsiceros whole brain (Br_N > Br_C, Br_I > Br_C), regardless of structure mapping.
structures <- c("Br","Cb","Ctx","Cx","Hp","P+M","RoB")
impossible <- do.call(rbind, lapply(structures, function(st){
  C <- DosSantos_etal_2020_Table1[[paste0(st,"_C")]]
  N <- DosSantos_etal_2020_Table1[[paste0(st,"_N")]]
  I <- DosSantos_etal_2020_Table1[[paste0(st,"_I")]]
  sp <- DosSantos_etal_2020_Table1$"Species name"
  out <- data.frame()
  if (!is.null(N)) { bad <- which(!is.na(N) & !is.na(C) & N > C)
    if (length(bad)) out <- rbind(out, data.frame(Species=sp[bad], Structure=st, problem="N > C (impossible)", value=N[bad], total_cells_C=C[bad])) }
  if (!is.null(I)) { bad <- which(!is.na(I) & !is.na(C) & I > C)
    if (length(bad)) out <- rbind(out, data.frame(Species=sp[bad], Structure=st, problem="I > C (impossible)", value=I[bad], total_cells_C=C[bad])) }
  out
}))
print(impossible)
```

```{r}
# 6. "Hippocampus"
# "Hippocampus" C (number of cells)
unpublished <- data.frame(tabledirect_summary$`Number cells 2H`[tabledirect_summary$Structure == c("Hippocampus")], tabledirect_summary$`Animal Latin Name`[tabledirect_summary$Structure == c("Hippocampus")])
paper <- data.frame(DosSantos_etal_2020_Table1$Hp_C, DosSantos_etal_2020_Table1$"Species name")
colnames(paper)=c("Hp_C", "Species")
colnames(unpublished)=c("Hp_C_U", "Species")
merged_df<- merge(paper,unpublished, all = T)
## the different ones
paper[!paper$Hp_C %in% unpublished$Hp_C_U, ]
## Calculate percentage difference
merged_df$Percentage_Difference <- ((merged_df$Hp_C_U - merged_df$Hp_C) / merged_df$Hp_C) * 100
merged_df
min(merged_df$Percentage_Difference, na.rm = TRUE)
max(merged_df$Percentage_Difference, na.rm = TRUE)
```

```{r}
# "Hippocampus" I/N (microglia per neurons)
unpublished <- data.frame(tabledirect_summary$`Iba1/N`[tabledirect_summary$Structure == c("Hippocampus")], tabledirect_summary$`Animal Latin Name`[tabledirect_summary$Structure == c("Hippocampus")])
paper <- data.frame(DosSantos_etal_2020_Table1$`Hp_I/N`, DosSantos_etal_2020_Table1$"Species name")
colnames(paper)=c("Hp_I/N", "Species")
colnames(unpublished)=c("Hp_I/N_U", "Species")
merged_df<- merge(paper,unpublished, all = T)
## the different ones after rounding up
paper[!paper$`Hp_I/N` %in% round(unpublished$`Hp_I/N_U`,digits=3), ]
## Calculate percentage difference
merged_df$Percentage_Difference <- ((merged_df$`Hp_I/N_U` - merged_df$`Hp_I/N`) / merged_df$`Hp_I/N`) * 100
merged_df
min(merged_df$Percentage_Difference, na.rm = TRUE)
max(merged_df$Percentage_Difference, na.rm = TRUE)
```
```{r}
# 7. "Pons + Medulla"
# "Pons + Medulla" C (number of cells)
unpublished <- data.frame(tabledirect_summary$`Number cells 2H`[tabledirect_summary$Structure == c("Pons + Medulla")], tabledirect_summary$`Animal Latin Name`[tabledirect_summary$Structure == c("Pons + Medulla")])
paper <- data.frame(DosSantos_etal_2020_Table1$`P+M_C`, DosSantos_etal_2020_Table1$"Species name")
colnames(paper)=c("P+M_C", "Species")
colnames(unpublished)=c("P+M_C_U", "Species")
merged_df<- merge(paper,unpublished, all = T)
## the different ones
paper[!paper$`P+M_C` %in% unpublished$`P+M_C_U`, ]
## Calculate percentage difference
merged_df$Percentage_Difference <- ((merged_df$`P+M_C_U` - merged_df$`P+M_C`) / merged_df$`P+M_C`) * 100
merged_df
min(merged_df$Percentage_Difference, na.rm = TRUE)
max(merged_df$Percentage_Difference, na.rm = TRUE)
```


```{r}
# "Pons + Medulla" I/N (microglia per neurons)
unpublished <- data.frame(tabledirect_summary$`Iba1/N`[tabledirect_summary$Structure == c("Pons + Medulla")], tabledirect_summary$`Animal Latin Name`[tabledirect_summary$Structure == c("Pons + Medulla")])
paper <- data.frame(DosSantos_etal_2020_Table1$`P+M_I/N`, DosSantos_etal_2020_Table1$"Species name")
colnames(paper)=c("P+M_I/N", "Species")
colnames(unpublished)=c("P+M_I/N_U", "Species")
merged_df<- merge(paper,unpublished, all = T)
## the different ones after rounding up
paper[!paper$`P+M_I/N` %in% round(unpublished$`P+M_I/N_U`,digits=3), ]
## Calculate percentage difference
merged_df$Percentage_Difference <- ((merged_df$`P+M_I/N_U` - merged_df$`P+M_I/N`) / merged_df$`P+M_I/N`) * 100
merged_df
min(merged_df$Percentage_Difference, na.rm = TRUE)
max(merged_df$Percentage_Difference, na.rm = TRUE)
```
## repeat for I/N for all other structures Cerebral Cortex etc.
## PROBABLY only keep I/N from that paper -- check I/N is OK
```{r}
unique(tabledirect_summary$Structure)
```
<!-- # ```{r} -->
<!-- # ref_table <- data.frame(Column_Name = colnames(DosSantos_etal_2020_Table1)[-1], -->
<!-- #                         Structure = sapply(strsplit(colnames(DosSantos_etal_2020_Table1)[-1], "_"), `[`, 1), -->
<!-- #                         Measure = sapply(strsplit(colnames(DosSantos_etal_2020_Table1)[-1], "_"), `[`, 2), -->
<!-- #                         Structure_U = character(length(colnames(DosSantos_etal_2020_Table1)[-1])), -->
<!-- #                         Measure_U = character(length(colnames(DosSantos_etal_2020_Table1)[-1])), -->
<!-- #                         Column_Name_U = character(length(colnames(DosSantos_etal_2020_Table1)[-1]))) -->
<!-- #  -->
<!-- # ``` -->
```{r}
structure_u <- unique(tabledirect_summary$Structure)
structure_u
```

<!-- ```{r} -->
<!-- ref_table$Structure_U[ref_table$Structure == "Br"] <- "Whole brain" -->
<!-- ref_table$Structure_U[ref_table$Structure == "Cb"] <- "Cerebellum" -->
<!-- ref_table$Structure_U[ref_table$Structure == "Ctx"] <- "GM+WM" -->
<!-- ref_table$Structure_U[ref_table$Structure == "Cx"] <- "GM+WM+hippoc" -->
<!-- ref_table$Structure_U[ref_table$Structure == "Hp"] <- "Hippocampus" -->
<!-- ref_table$Structure_U[ref_table$Structure == "P+M"] <- "Pons + Medulla" -->
<!-- ref_table$Structure_U[ref_table$Structure == "RoB"] <- "Rest of Brain" -->
<!-- ``` -->

<!-- ```{r} -->
<!-- P_ref_table <- data.frame(Column_Name = colnames(DosSantos_etal_2020_Table1)[-1], -->
<!--                         Structure = sapply(strsplit(colnames(DosSantos_etal_2020_Table1)[-1], "_"), `[`, 1), -->
<!--                         Measure = sapply(strsplit(colnames(DosSantos_etal_2020_Table1)[-1], "_"), `[`, 2), -->

<!-- U_ref_table <- data.frame(Structure_U = unique(tabledirect_summary$Structure), -->
<!--                         Structure_U = character(length(colnames(DosSantos_etal_2020_Table1)[-1])), -->
<!--                         Measure_U = character(length(colnames(DosSantos_etal_2020_Table1)[-1])), -->
<!--                         Column_Name_U = character(length(colnames(DosSantos_etal_2020_Table1)[-1]))) -->
<!-- ``` -->

```{r}
# Calculate new I/C columns for publication dataset
# Get the column names (excluding the first column)
column_names <- colnames(DosSantos_etal_2020_Table1)[-1]

# Split column names by the underscore
split_names <- strsplit(column_names, "_")

# Extract prefixes and suffixes
prefixes <- sapply(split_names, `[`, 1)  # Get the first element (prefix)
suffixes <- sapply(split_names, `[`, 2)  # Get the second element (suffix)

# Get unique prefixes and suffixes
unique_prefixes<-unique(prefixes)
unique_suffixes<-unique(suffixes)

unique_prefixes
unique_suffixes
```
```{r}
# Loop through each unique prefix
for (prefix in unique_prefixes) {
  # Create column names for 'I' and 'C' suffixes for the current prefix
  I_col <- paste0(prefix, "_I")
  C_col <- paste0(prefix, "_C")

  # Check if both columns (I and C) exist in the dataset
  if (I_col %in% colnames(DosSantos_etal_2020_Table1) & C_col %in% colnames(DosSantos_etal_2020_Table1)) {
    # Create a new column with the ratio I / C
    new_col <- paste0(prefix, "_I/C")
    DosSantos_etal_2020_Table1[[new_col]] <- DosSantos_etal_2020_Table1[[I_col]] / DosSantos_etal_2020_Table1[[C_col]]
  }
}
```
# Run similar comparisons for microglia per cells

# Whole Brain I/C (ratio migroglia per cells)
```{r}
UV <- "%Iba1+"
US <- "Whole brain"
PSV <- "Br_I/C"

unpublished <- data.frame(tabledirect_summary[[UV]][tabledirect_summary$Structure == US], tabledirect_summary$"Animal Latin Name"[tabledirect_summary$Structure == US])
paper <- data.frame(DosSantos_etal_2020_Table1[[PSV]], DosSantos_etal_2020_Table1$"Species name")
colnames(paper) <- c(PSV, "Species")
colnames(unpublished) <- c(paste0(PSV, "_U"), "Species")
# Round the columns to 3 decimal places before comparing
paper[[PSV]] <- round(paper[[PSV]], digits = 3)
unpublished[[paste0(PSV, "_U")]] <- round(unpublished[[paste0(PSV, "_U")]], digits = 3)
merged_df <- merge(paper, unpublished, all = TRUE)
## the different ones
different_rows <- paper[!paper[[PSV]] %in% unpublished[[paste0(PSV, "_U")]], ]
## Calculate percentage difference
merged_df$Percentage_Difference <- ((merged_df[[paste0(PSV, "_U")]] - merged_df[[PSV]]) / merged_df[[PSV]]) * 100
# add merged_df to the list
df_list[[paste0(PSV)]]<-merged_df
# Subset rows where Percentage_Difference is greater than zero
subset_df <- subset(merged_df, abs(Percentage_Difference) > 0, select = c("Species", "Percentage_Difference"))
print(subset_df)
```

# "Cerebral cortex, total (GM+WM+hippoc)" I/C (ratio migroglia per cells)
```{r}
UV <- "%Iba1+"
US <- "Cerebral cortex, total (GM+WM+hippoc)"
PSV <- "Cx_I/C"

unpublished <- data.frame(tabledirect_summary[[UV]][tabledirect_summary$Structure == US], tabledirect_summary$"Animal Latin Name"[tabledirect_summary$Structure == US])
paper <- data.frame(DosSantos_etal_2020_Table1[[PSV]], DosSantos_etal_2020_Table1$"Species name")
colnames(paper) <- c(PSV, "Species")
colnames(unpublished) <- c(paste0(PSV, "_U"), "Species")
# Round the columns to 3 decimal places before comparing
paper[[PSV]] <- round(paper[[PSV]], digits = 3)
unpublished[[paste0(PSV, "_U")]] <- round(unpublished[[paste0(PSV, "_U")]], digits = 3)
merged_df <- merge(paper, unpublished, all = TRUE)
## the different ones
different_rows <- paper[!paper[[PSV]] %in% unpublished[[paste0(PSV, "_U")]], ]
## Calculate percentage difference
merged_df$Percentage_Difference <- ((merged_df[[paste0(PSV, "_U")]] - merged_df[[PSV]]) / merged_df[[PSV]]) * 100
# add merged_df to the list
df_list[[paste0(PSV)]]<-merged_df
# Subset rows where Percentage_Difference is greater than zero
subset_df <- subset(merged_df, abs(Percentage_Difference) > 0, select = c("Species", "Percentage_Difference"))
print(subset_df)
```
